name: Wall Kickers
description: Smash the walls, set yourself free from the boring energy of office space, classroom or crowded streets. Breaking walls will make you feel alive and stronger than ever! Take control of your angry Hulk friend and run to smash every wall in your way. Complete more than 50 levels and be the Smash God. Website Developer <a href='https://kiz10.com'>https://kiz10.com</a>
instructions: controls Use the mouse to speed up
